S1.W1.name: goose-runtime (Rust, subprocess-via-ACP/MCP per W1.T0 Outcome B; +Dockerfile per ADR-V2-019)
S1.W1.t2_5_completion: 2026-04-16 @ e78d858 + 2cf5af9. Dockerfile multi-stage (rust:1.92-bookworm builder → debian:bookworm-slim runtime) bakes goose v1.30.0 via GitHub release download_cli.sh with GOOSE_VERSION env passthrough (plan template had URL/env conflation bug — fixed + documented inline). libgomp1 added to apt install keep-after-purge (debian-slim omits it; ldd diagnostic added for forensics). Image 361MB, SHA fce46f95e216. Makefile +3 targets goose-runtime-container-{build,run,verify-f1}. main.rs +tracing_subscriber fmt::init + EAASP_DEPLOYMENT_MODE env read + log. goose_adapter.rs +max_sessions+with_mode()+getter+start_session cap check per ADR-V2-019 D2 + 4 new unit tests. F1 gate PASS: docker run --entrypoint goose eaasp-goose-runtime:dev info → exit 0, prints v1.30.0 config paths. Smoke PASS: docker run eaasp-goose-runtime:dev → prints `mode=shared (stub, no server bind yet)` exits clean. cargo test 8/8 PASS (4 T2 + 2 smoke + 4 new with_mode). 3 build iterations: 1st fail template GOOSE_VERSION, 2nd fail libgomp1, 3rd GREEN with ldd fix. D141 ✅ CLOSED. Replaces frozen hermes-runtime as L1 container reference template.
